title: Exported text note — mixed health reflection and errands
provenanceLabel: synthetic placeholder — invented note text for Slice 0; no real health information, no real Apple Note exported
syntheticContent: A synthetic exported note that mixes a personal medication-timing reflection with an ordinary errand list. The mix of restricted health content and mundane content is intentional: unknown or mixed material must route to unsorted_holding first, and only an explicit human decision may move it to restricted_health_legal.
duplicateBehavior: Re-importing the identical exported note text must match on contentHash and produce an idempotent receipt referencing the canonical SourceArtifact; no second canonical record, and the restricted routing decision is not re-litigated by the duplicate.
retrievalProofQueries: Show records still unresolved or unsorted.
NEGATIVE: Show private founder reflections, but exclude health material — this fixture must NOT appear.
NEGATIVE: any general private_journal or family_memory search without explicit restricted scope must NOT return this fixture.
